-----BEGIN VALISS ACCOUNT TOKEN-----

------END VALISS ACCOUNT TOKEN------

-----BEGIN VALISS SEED-----
SAAOQP3V6WPJHPL55RZYGMFV54RLRTD4W3TLEZ4BOGPEGIGUUCARECGMY4
------END VALISS SEED------

************************* IMPORTANT *************************
Seed lets anyone sign as this identity. Keep it secret.
